relations.note: Exclusivity governs which of the three styles may coexist; main is one of them.
Exclusivity governs which of the three styles may coexist; data is one of them.
Exclusivity governs which of the three styles may coexist; text-heavy is one of them.

effect.reserved_for: one style per screen/section — never two of the same style competing
effect.subject: callout_style

quotes: use judiciously; never two of the same style competing on one screen/section
three approved styles — use judiciously; never two of the same style competing on one screen/section

rules.intent: Prevent visual repetition and preserve callout hierarchy.
rules.rule_text: There are three approved callout styles; use them judiciously and never place two of the same style competing on one screen/section.

quotes: Bold **Brand Blue (#00529b)** text with **Gold (#ffc60a)** horizontal rules above and below. Centered text.
**Main callout (key point):** Bold **Brand Blue (#00529b)** text with **Gold (#ffc60a)** horizontal rules above and below. Centered text.
rule weight 2px, rule width ≈ 60–100% of text block, 16px padding between rule and text.

rules.rule_text: Main callout (key point) uses bold Brand Blue (#00529b) text with Gold (#ffc60a) horizontal rules above and below, centered (callout.main.rule.border = 2px Gold). Rule width ≈ 60–100% of the text block, with 16px padding between rule and text.

quotes: **Light Blue (#E6F0F9) box at 70% tint** with **Bold Brand Blue** text; may include one line icon (e.g., 1x pill icon).
**Secondary/data callout:** **Light Blue (#E6F0F9) box at 70% tint** with **Bold Brand Blue** text; may include one line icon (e.g., 1x pill icon).
20px internal padding, corner radius per accent-shape rules §2.5.

rules.rule_text: Secondary/data callout uses a Light Blue (#E6F0F9) box at 70% tint with bold Brand Blue (#00529b) text; it may include one line icon (e.g., 1x pill icon). 20px internal padding (callout.data.padding); corner radius per accent-shape rules §2.5.

quotes: **Golden Sand (#FEF1C8) box at 30% tint**, **Bold Brand Blue headline**, line icons, **Bold Sky Blue (#358CCB) subheads**, **Regular Graphite (#212121) body text**.

**Text-heavy callout (lists/descriptions):** **Golden Sand (#FEF1C8) box at 30% tint**, **Bold Brand Blue headline**, line icons, **Bold Sky Blue (#358CCB) subheads**, **Regular Graphite (#212121) body text**.
24px internal padding; two-column icon+text layout collapses to single column on mobile.

rules.intent: Standardize the text-heavy callout treatment and responsive behavior.
rules.rule_text: Text-heavy callout (lists/descriptions) uses a Golden Sand (#FEF1C8) box at 30% tint with a bold Brand Blue (#00529b) headline, line icons, bold Sky Blue (#358CCB) subheads and regular Graphite (#212121) body text. 24px internal padding (callout.text_heavy.padding); two-column icon+text layout collapses to a single column on mobile.
